author: Ubisoft YouTube
text:
A new Panther is dropping tomorrow 🐆🔥
You have 7 days to hit Platinum in the Summit Contest and to your collection the Honda Civic Type R Red Panther Edition.

author: Ubisoft YouTube
text: Need a minute? We've got you. Just sit back and enjoy some of the views from #TheCrewMotorfest 🌤️😎
